headline: Americans Are Eating Less Chocolate and More Salty Snacks. This Stock Could Benefit.
summary: Utz Brands stands out as a beneficiary of shifting consumer preferences thanks to its lineup of salty snacks, one analyst says.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Hershey (HSY) After Its Strong 1 Year Share Price Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Hershey at around US$210.84 is still offering value after a strong run, this breakdown will help you put the current share price in context. The stock has returned 2.3% over the last 7 days, 15.6% year to date and 32.4% over the past year, while the 30 day return of 3.7% and 3 year return of 11.2% sit alongside a 5 year return of 47.8%. Recent coverage has focused on how consumer staples names like Hershey are holding investor interest as markets reassess...
